item: Board outline defined and correct dimensions
Design rules (DRC) configured per manufacturer specs
High-speed components placed close to related circuitry
Decoupling capacitors placed close to IC power pins
Thermal management components placed for heat dissipation
Connectors oriented for ease of assembly and use
Power and ground planes poured and connected
Differential pairs routed with matched lengths
Return paths uninterrupted under high-speed signals
Via stubs minimized on high-speed nets
Series termination resistors placed close to drivers
Power planes are solid with no unnecessary splits
Decoupling capacitor placement and routing verified
Power entry filtering placed near board edge
Adequate copper poured for power and ground
Reference designators visible and not overlapping pads
Board revision and date code on silkscreen
Polarity markings on all polarized components
Fab notes and drill legend included
